content: عايزين نجمع الزبالة ونرميها في المقلوب
translations: eng:we need to collect the trash and throw it in the rubbish dump

transcriptions.arabizi: Aaeyizeen nigammaA ilzibbaela wa nirmee|ha fiilma'lab
